金牌团队的稳赚计划导师【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238163212_61258561<br>vk.com/topic-238580520_61765965<br>vk.com/topic-238529743_60914520<br>vk.com/topic-238264836_61010867<br>vk.com/topic-238550546_61010869<br>vk.com/topic-237864457_62104788<br>vk.com/topic-238581373_60914533<br>vk.com/topic-238445856_61010878<br>vk.com/topic-238522422_61258598<br>vk.com/topic-238539764_60674058<br>vk.com/topic-238309426_61010894<br>vk.com/topic-238264951_62289922<br>vk.com/topic-238135598_61145922<br>vk.com/topic-238581005_60564407<br>vk.com/topic-238552411_62289949<br>vk.com/topic-237864365_60564401<br>vk.com/topic-238163440_61766028<br>vk.com/topic-238163236_61010919<br>vk.com/topic-238581371_62289965<br>vk.com/topic-238580497_62104871<br>vk.com/topic-238580010_61766043<br>vk.com/topic-238343792_61258654<br>vk.com/topic-238581078_61145974<br>vk.com/topic-238552414_60674136<br>vk.com/topic-238163166_61010957<br>vk.com/topic-238126536_61010973<br>vk.com/topic-238265094_60674159<br>vk.com/topic-238539186_61011002<br>vk.com/topic-238394666_61010980<br>vk.com/topic-238581368_61146007<br>vk.com/topic-238580093_60914644<br>vk.com/topic-238100043_60914656<br>vk.com/topic-238135070_61766101<br>vk.com/t
